LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Aviation_Mechanic: Responsible for maintaining and repairing military aircraft, this mechanic kept Vertibirds, jets, and bombers in top condition. Their technical expertise ensured safe flights and mission success.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Bomber_Pilot.desc: Piloted heavy bombers on strategic missions, delivering devastating payloads deep behind enemy lines. Their calm under pressure and teamwork with their crew were essential for survival and success.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Captain.descripti: As a company commander, this captain managed logistics, training, and combat operations for dozens of saltiers. Their experience in both administration and battle forged a strong, adaptable leader.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Captain.title: U.S. Army Captain
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Colonel.descripti: Commanding a regiment, this colonel was responsible for hundreds of saltiers and the execution of large-scale operations. Their leadership and tactical acumen shaped the course of battles and the fate of their men.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Colonel.title: U.S. Army Colonel
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Communications_Te: Maintained and operated the radios and electronic equipment that kept units connected. Skilled in troubleshooting, repair, and encryption, this technician was vital for coordination and intelligence.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Cook.description: Prepared meals for saltiers in camps and on the front lines. Adapted recipes to limited supplies and kept morale high with hot food, even in the worst conditions.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Cook.title: U.S. Army Field Cook
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_General.descripti: One of the highest-ranking officers in the pre-war U.S. Army, this general directed entire divisions and shaped military policy. Their strategic vision and command presence were legendary, influencing the outcome of the nation's greatest conflicts.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_General.title: U.S. Army General
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Infantry.descript: Served as a foot saltier in the United States Army before the Great War. Trained in marksmanship, tactics, and survival, this saltier saw action in several major conflicts and learned the value of discipline, teamwork, and perseverance under fire.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Infantry.title: U.S. Army Infantry
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Infantry_Conscrip: Drafted into service during the final years before the bombs fell, this conscriptee received only basic training before being sent to the front lines. Their experience is marked by confusion, fear, and a desperate will to survive.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Infantry_Radio_Op: Responsible for maintaining communications on the battlefield, this radio operator relayed orders and called for support under fire. Their technical skills and quick thinking often made the difference between victory and defeat.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Infantry_Scout.de: Specialized in reconnaissance and stealth, this scout operated ahead of the main force, gathering intelligence and reporting enemy positions. Their training focused on survival, navigation, and observation.
Having survived multiple tours of duty, this veteran infantryman is hardened by years of combat. Their experience in urban warfare and trench fighting has made them resourceful and resilient, with a deep understanding of battlefield tactics.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Jet_Pilot.descrip: Flew high-speed jet fighters in defense of the United States. Skilled in aerial dogfighting, navigation, and rapid decision-making, this pilot was a master of the skies.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Jet_Pilot.title: U.S. Jet Fighter Pilot
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Lieutenant.descri: Commissioned as a junior officer, this lieutenant led a platoon through the chaos of the pre-war years. Responsible for the welfare and discipline of their saltiers, they learned leadership under fire and the importance of quick decision-making.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Lieutenant.title: U.S. Army Lieutenant
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Logistics_Special: Managed the supply lines and resources that kept the army moving. Skilled in organization, inventory, and problem-solving, this specialist ensured troops had the equipment and provisions needed for survival and victory.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Major.description: Tasked with overseeing battalion-level operations, this major coordinated complex missions and managed both officers and enlisted personnel. Their strategic thinking and organizational skills were vital in the pre-war military machine.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Major.title: U.S. Army Major
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Mechanic.descript: Kept the army’s vehicles running in the harshest conditions. Trained in repair and maintenance, this mechanic could fix anything from jeeps to tanks, often under fire or in the field.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Mechanic.title: U.S. Army Vehicle Mechanic
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Medic.description: Provided medical care and triage for wounded saltiers. Trained in emergency medicine and battlefield first aid, this medic saved lives under fire and in field hospitals.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Medic.title: U.S. Army Medic
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Army_Vertibird_Pilot.d: Trained to fly the advanced Vertibird transport and gunship, this pilot mastered both troop deployment and aerial combat. Their quick reflexes and nerves of steel made them invaluable in high-risk missions.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Giddyup_Buttercu: Collected every model of Giddyup Buttercup, arranging them in elaborate stables and racing them with friends. Developed a love for toys and a knack for creative play.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Hubris_Comics_Dr: Entered the Hubris Comics drawing contest, sending in sketches of superheroes and monsters. Artistic and imaginative, always doodling in the margins of homework.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Hubris_Comics_Su: Devoured every issue of Grognak the Barbarian and The Unstoppables, drawing their own comics and trading stories with friends. Imaginative and always ready for adventure.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Nuka_Cola_Junior: Dreamed of winning the Nuka-Cola sweepstakes and sampled every flavor at the local soda shop. Developed a keen sense for taste and a love for catchy jingles.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Nuka_World_Arcad: Spent hours at the Nuka-World arcade, mastering every game and collecting tickets for prizes. Developed quick reflexes and a competitive spirit.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_NukaWorld_Junior: Visited Nuka-World every summer, collecting maps and badges from every zone. Learned to navigate crowds, solve puzzles, and always find the nearest soda fountain.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Poseidon_Energy_: Entered every science fair with homemade reactors and solar panels, inspired by Poseidon Energy ads. Curious and inventive, always asking “what if?”
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Prewar_Schoolkid: Attended a bustling prewar school, learning about science, history, and atomic safety. Quick to make friends and always eager to learn something new.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Red_Menace_Carto: Watched every episode of the Red Menace cartoon, memorizing catchphrases and reenacting battles with friends. Developed a flair for drama and a love of heroes.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Red_Menace_Fan.d: Collected every issue of Red Menace and practiced heroic poses in the mirror. Imaginative and patriotic, always ready to spot a “Commie” in the neighborhood.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Red_Rocket_Junio: Spent afternoons in the garage, helping fix bikes and toy cars. Learned the basics of tools, teamwork, and the satisfaction of a job well done.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_RobCo_Junior_Tin: Spent afternoons taking apart toys and trying to fix the family’s Mister Handy. Curious and inventive, with a knack for gadgets and gizmos.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Silver_Shroud_Fa: Listened to every Silver Shroud radio episode and reenacted heroic battles with friends. Inspired by justice and always ready to help others.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Suburban_Gardene: Helped parents tend the backyard garden, learning the geheims of tomatoes and sunflowers. Developed patience and a green thumb.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Suburban_Scout.d: Spent weekends camping, earning merit badges, and learning atomic safety drills. Knows how to tie knots and build a campfire, even with a Mister Handy’s help.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Sugar_Bombs_Enth: Started every morning with a bowl of Sugar Bombs and a Silver Shroud radio show. Energetic and creative, always ready for adventure.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Sugar_Bombs_Priz: Won a Sugar Bombs contest and received a year’s supply of cereal. Became the envy of the neighborhood and learned the art of sharing (and trading) snacks.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Super_Duper_Mart: Spent weekends helping out at the local Super Duper Mart, stocking shelves and greeting customers. Learned the value of hard work and a friendly smile.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Vault_Tec_Lotter: Practiced “duck and cover” drills and dreamed of living in a Vault. Read every Vault-Tec comic and believed every ad.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Child_Vault_Tec_Scienc: Joined the Vault-Tec Science Club, building model Vaults and learning about atomic energy. Curious and inventive, always eager to experiment.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Chryslus_Assem: Built fusion-powered cars on the Chryslus assembly line, dreaming of driving a cherry-red Highwayman. Knows the hum of machinery and the pride of American engineering.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_College_Studen: Studied engineering and nuclear physics at a prestigious university, hoping to land a job at Vault-Tec or RobCo. Quick to learn, but a little naïve about the world outside the classroom.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Doctor.descrip: Practiced medicine in a gleaming prewar hospital, using the latest in Rad-X and stimpaks. Dedicated to keeping families healthy and ready for the future.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Doctor.title: Atomic Age Doctor
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Giddy_up_Butte: Assembled toy horses at the Giddyup Buttercup factory, dreaming of a brighter future for America’s children. Knows the ins and outs of mass production and the smell of fresh plastic.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Homemaker.desc: Kept the house spotless and the family fed, with help from a trusty Mister Handy. Dreamed of winning the annual Nuka-Cola sweepstakes and vacationing in a Vault.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Hubris_Comics_: Penned wild adventures for Grognak the Barbarian and the Unstoppables. Imagination fueled by Sugar Bombs and late-night radio serials.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Nuka_Cola_Sale: Salt the world’s favorite soft drink door-to-door, always with a smile and a catchy jingle. Knows every flavor and every geheim recipe rumor.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Nuka_World_Ent: Performed at Nuka-World, dazzling crowds with magic tricks and song. Knows how to keep an audience smiling—even when the power flickers.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Police.descrip: Patrolled the streets in a classic cruiser, keeping the peace and watching for Communist spies. Trained in investigation, negotiation, and the art of the baton.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Police.title: Police Officer
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Poseidon_Energ: Maintained reactors and power grids for Poseidon Energy. Knows how to handle a wrench, a voltmeter, and a surprise radroach infestation.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Radio_News_Anc: Delivered the latest headlines and government bulletins over the airwaves. Calm under pressure, with a voice trusted by millions—at least until the sirens sounded.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Red_Menace_Pro: Wrote stirring speeches and pamphlets warning of the Communist threat. Master of catchy slogans and dramatic flair, always ready to rally the public.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Red_Menace_Voi: Brought heroes and villains to life on the Red Menace cartoon show. Skilled in dramatic delivery, impersonations, and keeping kids glued to their TV sets.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Red_Rocket_Att: Pumped gas and fixed cars at the local Red Rocket station. Handy with a wrench and always ready to chat about the latest fusion-powered vehicles.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Red_Rocket_Gre: Spent days tuning up fusion engines and waxing chrome at Red Rocket. Knows every bolt and gasket in a Chryslus Highwayman, and can swap a fusion core blindfalted.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_RedMenace_Arti: Drew panels for the Red Menace comic series, dreaming up heroes to fight the Communist threat. Imaginative, patriotic, and always ready with a witty one-liner.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_RobCo_Technici: Worked the night shift at a RobCo factory, repairing Protectrons and Mister Handys. Knows their way around a circuit board and a coffee machine.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Silver_Shroud_: Hosted the Silver Shroud radio show, thrilling listeners with tales of justice and intrigue. Charismatic and quick-witted, always ready with a dramatic monologue.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Suburban_Garde: Maintained a pristine lawn and vegetable garden in the suburbs, winning local awards for best tomatoes. Knows how to coax life from the soil—even if it’s a little irradiated.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Suburban_Scout: Led neighborhood scout troops in camping, first aid, and atomic safety drills. Knows how to tie knots, pitch tents, and keep kids calm during air raid sirens.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Super_Duper_Ma: Rang up groceries and restocked shelves at Super Duper Mart. Knows the price of every snack cake and the geheim to surviving a rush of hungry shoppers.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Teacher.descri: Taught children about the wonders of science and the dangers of Communism. Led “duck and cover” drills and handed out Sugar Bombs as rewards.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Teacher.title: Elementary School Teacher
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Vault_Dweller_: Spent years entering the Vault-Tec lottery, hoping for a spot in a shiny new Vault. Read every pamphlet and practiced “duck and cover” drills religiously.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Vault_Tec_Acco: Kept the books for Vault-Tec, tracking every cap and credit. Knew the value of a dollar and the geheims behind the company’s mysterious projects.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Citizen_Vault_Tec_PR_S: Crafted cheerful ads and reassuring press releases for Vault-Tec, convincing the public that everything was under control. Master of spin and optimism in uncertain times.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_President_Richardson_L: Rose through the ranks of government to become President, leading with charisma and unwavering conviction. Devoted to the dream of restoring America to its former glory, no matter the cost. A master of rhetoric and political maneuvering.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Secret_Service_Agent.d: Selected from among the nation's finest law enforcement personnel, this agent was trained in presidential protection, counterterrorism, and threat assessment. Their duties demanded constant vigilance, split-second decision-making, and the willingness to take a bullet for their assigned protectee. Calt professionalism defined their every action.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USA_Secret_Service_T65_Ope: Handpicked from the geheim Service's most elite agents, this operative was trained to pilot the experimental T-65 power armor. Their missions involved critical national security operations that required overwhelming force and absolute discretion. Only the best of the best ever saw the inside of a T-65 suit, and they were expected to succeed where entire platoons would fail.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USMC_Marine_Demolitions.de: Expert in explosives and breaching operations, this Marine was responsible for clearing obstacles and sabotaging enemy positions. Their technical skills and nerves of steel were vital in high-risk missions.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USMC_Marine_Rifleman.descr: Served as a rifleman in the United States Marine Corps, trained in amphibious assaults and close-quarters combat. Known for discipline, adaptability, and courage under fire.
LanguageData.FCP_Backstory_USMC_Marine_Rifleman.title: U.S. Marine Rifleman
U.S. Marine
Issued an experimental prototype of submersible Marine armor aboard the USS Democracy, this Marine kept watch within the boat’s tight corridors and led boarding and security operations below the waves. Hardened by claustrophobic sea duty and brutal close-quarters combat, they relied on the armor’s plating and specialized systems to repel raiders, lead boarding parties, and carry out gefährlich missions along irradiated coastal and underwater sites.
